hero.headline: Beautiful floors and interiors, installed right.
hero.intro: Flooring, kitchen islands, bathrooms, and natural stone — designed and installed by our own crew for homes and commercial spaces across {area}.
hero.alt: Living room with wide-plank wood-look floor installed by MG Flooring

points.p1: Free, no-obligation quotes — reply within one business day
points.p3: Clean, on-time installs by our own crew

disciplines.label: What we do
disciplines.title: Installation and interior design, under one roof.

d1.title: Flooring Installation
d1.body: Hardwood, marble, large-format porcelain, and natural stone floors — measured, laid, and finished by our own crew.

d2.title: Kitchens & Islands
d2.body: Waterfall islands, countertops, and full kitchen surfaces fabricated and installed to the millimetre.

d3.title: Bathrooms
d3.body: Walk-in showers, vanities, and complete bathroom remodels — waterproofed and built to last.

d4.title: Interior Design & Restoration
d4.body: Material selection, layout, and finish design — plus grinding, polishing, and sealing to bring existing floors back to life.

sectors.label: Who we work with
sectors.title: Two markets. The same standard of craft.

residential.label: For homeowners
residential.title: Residential
residential.body: Kitchens, bathrooms, and whole-home flooring for houses and condos across South Florida.

commercial.label: For businesses
commercial.title: Commercial
commercial.body: Offices, restaurants, and high-traffic public spaces — including ongoing work at Miami International Airport.

steps.label: How it works
steps.title: Three simple steps to new floors.
steps.note: Free and no-obligation — most quotes go out within one business day.

s1.title: Tell us about your project
s1.body: Call or send the quick form with a few details — the room, rough size, and the material you have in mind.

s2.title: Get a free quote
s2.body: We visit, measure, and send a clear, itemized quote. No pressure, no obligation.

s3.title: We install
s3.body: Our own crew installs on schedule, keeps the site clean, and walks you through the finished work.

faq.label: Questions
faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.more: Have another question? Call us at

f1.a: Yes — every quote is free and no-obligation. Send the contact form or call {phone} and we'll get back to you within one business day.

f2.a: Whole-home flooring, kitchen islands and counters, and full bathroom remodels — hardwood, marble, porcelain, and natural stone. We're installers and interior designers, not a materials shop: we help you choose and source, then we build.

f3.a: We serve {area}, for both homes and commercial spaces — our commercial crews currently work at Miami International Airport.

f4.q: How long does an installation take?
f4.a: Most single rooms take 2–5 days depending on size and material. You'll get a clear timeline with your quote, and we stick to it.

f5.a: Yes — fully licensed and insured. References from past clients are available on request.

cta.label: Start a project
cta.title: Let’s talk about your floors and stone.

work.h1: Drag the divider. See the difference.
work.intro: Real transformations from real projects — homes, offices, and restaurants across South Florida. Drag any divider to compare.

residential.label: Residential
residential.intro: From a single bathroom to whole-home flooring, we design and install floors, kitchen islands, and bathrooms for homes across {area} — with one crew from first measurement to final walkthrough.
residential.heroAlt: Staircase and wood floors in a renovated Miami home

services.label: Residential services
services.title: What we do for your home.

s1.title: Whole-Home Flooring
s1.body: Hardwood, herringbone, marble, and large-format porcelain — supplied by you or sourced with our design guidance, installed by us.

s2.title: Kitchen Islands & Counters
s2.body: Waterfall islands, countertops, and backsplashes fabricated and fitted to the millimetre.

s3.title: Bathroom Remodels
s3.body: Walk-in showers, floor-to-ceiling stone, vanities, and heated floors — fully waterproofed.

s4.title: Interior Design
s4.body: Not sure what fits your space? We help you choose materials, layouts, and finishes that work together.

featured.label: Featured transformation
featured.title: A dated bathroom, rebuilt from the floor up.

commercial.label: Commercial
commercial.h1: Floors built for heavy traffic and tight schedules.
commercial.intro: Offices, restaurants, retail, and public infrastructure across South Florida. We plan around your hours, work in phases, and deliver surfaces that stand up to real use.
commercial.heroAlt: Modern office space with seamless polished flooring

mia.label: Featured client
mia.title: Miami International Airport
mia.body: We are an active flooring contractor at MIA, installing and restoring high-durability surfaces across terminal areas — phased night work, strict safety compliance, and zero disruption to passenger flow.
mia.alt: Aircraft at a Miami International Airport terminal

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.title: Built for commercial conditions.
capabilities.note: Licensed and insured for commercial work. References and certificates of insurance available on request.

c1.title: Airports & Public Spaces
c1.body: High-durability terrazzo, stone, and porcelain for terminals, lobbies, and transit areas — installed in phases around operations.

c2.title: Offices & Lobbies
c2.body: Polished concrete, stone, and wood systems that make a first impression and survive daily traffic.

c3.title: Restaurants & Retail
c3.body: Fast-turnaround installs between lease and opening day, with materials rated for spills and heavy footfall.

c4.title: Maintenance & Restoration
c4.body: Scheduled grinding, polishing, and sealing programs that keep commercial floors looking new.

featured.label: Featured transformation
featured.title: An office suite, resurfaced end to end.

kitchen-island.title: Marble Island Kitchen
kitchen-island.summary: A gutted kitchen rebuilt around a book-matched marble waterfall island — fabricated, set, and sealed by our crew.

bath-remodel.title: Primary Bath Remodel
bath-remodel.summary: A dated bathroom taken down to the studs and rebuilt: glass walk-in shower, quartz double vanity, and wood-look porcelain floors.

herringbone-floor.title: White-Oak Herringbone
herringbone-floor.summary: Worn pine boards replaced with hand-laid white-oak herringbone throughout the living areas.

living-floor.title: Wide-Plank Living Areas
living-floor.summary: Dated floors swapped for wide-plank oak with a full interior finish palette chosen with the owners.

office-suite.title: Office Suite Resurfacing
office-suite.summary: A tired suite resurfaced with a seamless polished floor system — installed in phases over two weekends, zero downtime.

restaurant-wynwood.title: Wynwood Dining Room
restaurant-wynwood.summary: A worn retail space converted into a moody dining room with dark engineered-wood floors rated for heavy service.

t1.quote: They transformed our worn-out living room into something out of a magazine. The white oak floors are flawless and the crew was meticulous start to finish.

t2.quote: The marble work in our master bath is stunning. They helped us pick the slab, handled everything, and left the site spotless every single day.

t3.quote: Honest pricing, no surprises, and the slate entry looks better than we imagined. We’ve already booked them for the patio.

t4.quote: Our old granite counters looked dead. After their restoration they shine like new — saved us thousands versus replacement.

t5.quote: Craftsmanship you rarely see anymore. The herringbone floor in our kitchen is a showpiece and everyone asks who did it.

t6.quote: Professional, punctual, and genuinely skilled with natural stone. Communication was excellent throughout the project.
